requirements.task_name: Start a 14-day trial of the cheapest plan with meal plans priced between $15–$25/month
requirements.task_description: Use pricing to find the cheapest plan between $15–$25/month that includes meal plans, then complete the 14-day trial sign-up with specific details.

requirements.task_name: Save a beginner, no-equipment home workout plan with at least 3 weekly sessions
requirements.task_description: Filter workout plans to beginner, no-equipment, home, with ≥3 sessions/week, then save such a plan.

required_variables.set_condition: Whenever searchWorkoutPlans(filters) is called (on every invocation), after normalizing filters to an object.
required_variables.reason: Allows the evaluator to inspect the most recent workout search filters and confirm that the user requested beginner level, no_equipment, home location, and a minSessionsPerWeek of at least 3 (matching the task’s filter requirements). The actual saved plan selection will be validated via existing workout_plans and saved_workout_plans.

requirements.task_name: Create a 3-day weekly schedule with strength, cardio, and yoga sessions under 45 minutes
requirements.task_description: For the week 'Mon 4 – Sun 10', schedule strength (Mon), cardio (Wed), and yoga (Fri) workouts, each ≤45 minutes.

requirements.task_name: Calculate a weight-loss calorie target and submit it via the 'Email me this plan' form
requirements.task_description: Calculate calories for a given profile (30-year-old female, 65 kg, 170 cm, moderately active, lose 0.5 kg/week) and then email that specific plan to cal.plan@example.com.

requirements.task_name: Select an annual plan under $40/month with the most 1:1 coaching sessions
requirements.task_description: Under annual billing, choose the plan with effective monthly cost ≤$40 that offers the highest number of 1:1 coaching sessions/month, and proceed through the checkout step.

requirements.task_name: Book an evening live class for tomorrow under 45 minutes with rating 4.5+
requirements.task_description: Filter tomorrow’s live classes for start times 6–10 PM, duration ≤45 minutes, rating ≥4.5, then book the first matching class using the name 'Sam Evening'.

required_variables.set_condition: On every invocation of searchLiveClasses(date, filters), after normalizing the date and filters arguments.
required_variables.reason: Allows the evaluator to confirm that the user searched for tomorrow’s date and applied a startTimeRange that corresponds to 18:00–22:00 (6–10 PM), maxDurationMinutes ≤ 45, and minRating ≥ 4.5. The actual booked class’s compliance with these constraints and the attendee name 'Sam Evening' is already verifiable via live_classes and live_class_bookings.

requirements.task_name: Subscribe to training tips emails 3 times per week focused on strength and mobility
requirements.task_description: Subscribe to the newsletter with specific email/name, focus areas strength and mobility, frequency 3x/week, and notifications limited to training tips & workout reminders.

requirements.task_name: Ask via chat if membership can be paused for 2 weeks without losing progress
requirements.task_description: Search the FAQ for 'pause membership', then start chat from that area and send a specific question about pausing membership for 2 weeks while keeping progress data.

required_variables.set_condition: On every invocation of searchFaqItems(query), after trimming the query string.
required_variables.reason: Enables the evaluator to verify that the user searched the FAQ with a query containing 'pause membership' before initiating chat. The subsequent chat session and the exact question text are already stored in chat_sessions and chat_messages.
